summary: Iteration 14 - Full System Audit: Complete regression testing after cleanup and demo data seeding. Backend: 30/30 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 6 panels verified working (Dashboard, Supplier Catalog, Energy Tracking, Convention Management, AI³ Intelligence, Culinary). All 22 requested test cases passed.
critical_code_review_comments: All 10 enterprise engines active and healthy (operations_core, ai_forecasting, pos_integration, event_lifecycle, labor_cost, event_bus, payroll, workflow, notifications, tamper_audit)
AI³ NLP endpoint working with Gemini LLM integration - returns contextual responses based on resort data
Supplier Catalog: Sysco (12 products) and US Foods (10 products) with compare, sync, and auto-PO functionality
Energy Tracking: 6 outlets with kWh consumption, cost estimates, and efficiency ratings
Convention Management: Shows events with breakout rooms and F&B packages
IoT Dashboard: 8 sensors (temperature, humidity, door, power) with alert detection
HACCP Compliance: 7 templates covering receiving, cooling, cooking, holding, sanitation, walk-in, allergen
Guest-facing Allergen Scanner page returns valid HTML with DOCTYPE and interactive allergen filtering
MenuBar.tsx has Compliance menu with Consumer Advisory Notice and Allergen Scanner QR options (data-testid='menu-compliance-btn')
seed_data_creation: TEST_Tech_Conference_2026 and TEST_Tech_Summit_2026 conventions from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 completed full system audit. All 80+ backend endpoints working. Key endpoints tested: /api/health, /api/ai3/ask, /api/supplier-catalog/*, /api/conventions, /api/energy/dashboard, /api/allergen-scanner-page/{menu_id}, /api/compliance/haccp-templates, /api/compliance/checklists, /api/procurement/vendor-scorecards, /api/procurement/spend-analytics, /api/iot/dashboard, /api/schedule/overtime-forecast, /api/casino/comps, /api/properties/transfer-orders. Frontend panels open via sidebar click or CustomEvent('open-panel', {detail:{id:'panel-key'}}). Supplier Catalog shows Sysco/US Foods with search, compare, sync. Energy Tracking shows 37,100 kWh total. Convention Management shows 4 events. AI³ Intelligence has voice button (data-testid='ai3-voice-btn'), command input, and send button. Compliance menu in MenuBar.tsx has Consumer Advisory and Allergen QR options.

backend_tests.ai3_ask_query: PASS - LLM response with contextual data
backend_tests.supplier_catalog_compare_salmon: PASS - Returns price comparison with best_value
backend_tests.supplier_catalog_auto_po: PASS - Returns PO with lines and total
backend_tests.allergen_scanner_api: PASS - JSON API with safe/unsafe items
backend_tests.inspection_readiness: PASS - Returns readiness score and grade

frontend_tests.dashboard_loads: PASS - Dashboard with sidebar showing all sections
frontend_tests.supplier_catalog_panel: PASS - Shows Sysco (12 products) and US Foods (10 products)
frontend_tests.convention_management_panel: PASS - Shows 4 events with breakout rooms
frontend_tests.ai3_intelligence_panel: PASS - Voice button, command input, send button visible
